import io
import os
import pandas as pd
import boto3
from botocore import UNSIGNED
from botocore.client import Config

bucket = 'lakeqa-yc4103-datalake'
source = 'datagov/a-community-profile-of-pittsburgh-neighborhoods-1974/files/arrests-for-major-crimes-1972.txt'
local_path = source if os.path.exists(source) else '/tmp/k123_data_cache/' + source
client = boto3.client('s3', region_name='us-east-1', config=Config(signature_version=UNSIGNED))

if os.path.exists(local_path):
    df = pd.read_csv(local_path, dtype=str, low_memory=False)
else:
    obj = client.get_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=source)
    df = pd.read_csv(io.BytesIO(obj['Body'].read()), dtype=str, low_memory=False)

df['neighborhood'] = df['neighborhood'].astype(str).str.strip()
answer = '; '.join(sorted(df['neighborhood'].dropna().unique().tolist()))

ideal_code.code:
import io
import os
import pandas as pd
import boto3
from botocore import UNSIGNED
from botocore.client import Config

bucket = 'lakeqa-yc4103-datalake'
source = 'datagov/1984-community-profiles-a-descriptive-picture-of-communities-in-allegheny-county/files/civics.txt'
local_path = source if os.path.exists(source) else '/tmp/k123_data_cache/' + source
client = boto3.client('s3', region_name='us-east-1', config=Config(signature_version=UNSIGNED))

if os.path.exists(local_path):
    df = pd.read_csv(local_path, dtype=str, low_memory=False)
else:
    obj = client.get_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=source)
    df = pd.read_csv(io.BytesIO(obj['Body'].read()), dtype=str, low_memory=False)

node_1_answer = '31st Ward; Allegheny Center; Allegheny West; Allentown; Arlington; Arlington Heights; Banksville; Bedford Dwellings; Beechview; Beltzhoover; Bloomfield; Bon Air; Brighton Heights; Brookline; California Ave.; Carrick; Central North Side; Crafton Heights - Westwood - Oakwood; East Carnegie; East Hills; East Liberty; East North Side; Elliot; Esplen; Friendship; Garfield; Greenfield; Harpen Hilltop; Hazelwood-Glenwood-Glen Hazel; Highland Park; Homewood North; Homewood South; Homewood West; Knoxville; Larimer; Lawrenceville; Lincoln-Lemington-Belmar; Lower Lawrenceville; Lower Oakland; Manchester; Middle Hill; Morningside; Mount Washington - Duquesne Heights; North Oakland; North View Heights; Perry North; Perry South; Point Breeze; Polish Hill; Regent Square; Ridgemont - Chicken Hill; Shadeland Halls Grove; Shadyside; Sheraton Chartiers; South Oakland; Southside Flats; Southside Slopes; Spring Hill; Squirrel Hill - North of Forbes; Squirrel Hill - South of Forbes; St. Clair; Stanton Heights; Swisshelm Park; Terrace Village; The Bluff; The Strip; Troy Hill; Upper Hill; Upper Lawrenceville; West End Valley'
allowed = set(node_1_answer.split('; '))
df['Community'] = df['Community'].astype(str).str.strip()
df['%grad_coll'] = pd.to_numeric(df['%grad_coll'].astype(str).str.replace('%', '', regex=False).str.strip(), errors='coerce')
filtered = df[df['Community'].isin(allowed) & df['%grad_coll'].notna()].copy()
ranked = filtered[['Community', '%grad_coll']].drop_duplicates().sort_values(['%grad_coll', 'Community'], ascending=[False, True]).head(10)
answer = '; '.join(ranked['Community'].tolist())

import io
import os
import pandas as pd
import boto3
from botocore import UNSIGNED
from botocore.client import Config

bucket = 'lakeqa-yc4103-datalake'
source = 'datagov/1984-community-profiles-a-descriptive-picture-of-communities-in-allegheny-county/files/population.txt'
local_path = source if os.path.exists(source) else '/tmp/k123_data_cache/' + source
client = boto3.client('s3', region_name='us-east-1', config=Config(signature_version=UNSIGNED))

if os.path.exists(local_path):
    df = pd.read_csv(local_path, dtype=str, low_memory=False)
else:
    obj = client.get_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=source)
    df = pd.read_csv(io.BytesIO(obj['Body'].read()), dtype=str, low_memory=False)

node_2_answer = 'Point Breeze; Regent Square; Shadyside; Highland Park; Allegheny Center; Friendship; Banksville; Stanton Heights; East Liberty; Greenfield'
node_3_answer = 'Stanton Heights; Point Breeze; Swisshelm Park; Highland Park; Banksville; Regent Square; Bon Air; Brookline; Greenfield; Beechview'
node_4_answer = 'Allegheny West; Arlington Heights; North Oakland; Morningside; South Oakland; Stanton Heights; Hazelwood-Glenwood-Glen Hazel; Polish Hill; Terrace Village; Knoxville'

df['Community'] = df['Community'].astype(str).str.strip()
df['pop_total_num'] = pd.to_numeric(df['pop_total'].astype(str).str.replace(',', '', regex=False).str.strip(), errors='coerce')
value = int(df.loc[df['Community'].eq(target_neighborhood), 'pop_total_num'].iloc[0])
answer = f"{value:,}"

    obj = client.get_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=source)
    df = pd.read_csv(io.BytesIO(obj['Body'].read()), dtype=str, low_memory=False)

df['Neighborhood'] = df['Neighborhood'].astype(str).str.strip()
df['poverty_pct'] = pd.to_numeric(df['Est. Percent Under Poverty (2010)'].astype(str).str.replace('%', '', regex=False).str.strip(), errors='coerce')
answer = '; '.join(sorted(df.loc[df['poverty_pct'] < 5, 'Neighborhood'].dropna().unique().tolist()))
ideal_code.answer: Lincoln Place; North Shore; Point Breeze; Regent Square; South Shore; Stanton Heights; Strip District; Swisshelm Park; West End

ideal_code.intent: Among the neighborhoods common to the answers to node 7, node 8, and node 9, which had the second-highest number of residents enrolled in grades 1 through 12 in 2015? Break any ties alphabetically.
ideal_code.code:
import io
import os
import pandas as pd
import boto3
from botocore import UNSIGNED
from botocore.client import Config

bucket = 'lakeqa-yc4103-datalake'
source = 'datagov/pittsburgh-american-community-survey-2015-school-enrollment/files/school-enrollment-by-detailed-level-of-school-for-the-population-3-years-and-over.txt'
local_path = source if os.path.exists(source) else '/tmp/k123_data_cache/' + source
client = boto3.client('s3', region_name='us-east-1', config=Config(signature_version=UNSIGNED))

if os.path.exists(local_path):
    df = pd.read_csv(local_path, dtype=str, low_memory=False)
else:
    obj = client.get_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=source)
    df = pd.read_csv(io.BytesIO(obj['Body'].read()), dtype=str, low_memory=False)

node_7_answer = 'Allegheny Center; Allegheny West; Allentown; Arlington; Arlington Heights; Banksville; Bedford Dwellings; Beltzhoover; Bon Air; California-Kirkbride; Central Business District; Central Lawrenceville; Central Northside; Chartiers City; Chateau; Crafton Heights; Crawford-Roberts; Duquesne Heights; East Allegheny; East Carnegie; East Hills; Elliott; Esplen; Fairywood; Fineview; Friendship; Garfield; Glen Hazel; Hays; Hazelwood; Homewood North; Homewood South; Homewood West; Knoxville; Larimer; Lincoln Place; Lincoln-Lemington-Belmar; Lower Lawrenceville; Manchester; Middle Hill; Morningside; Mt. Oliver; New Homestead; North Shore; Northview Heights; Oakwood; Overbrook; Perry North; Perry South; Point Breeze North; Polish Hill; Regent Square; Ridgemont; South Oakland; South Shore; South Side Slopes; Spring Garden; Spring Hill-City View; St. Clair; Stanton Heights; Strip District; Summer Hill; Swisshelm Park; Terrace Village; Troy Hill; Upper Hill; Upper Lawrenceville; West End; West Oakland; Westwood; Windgap'
node_8_answer = 'Allegheny Center; Allegheny West; Allentown; Arlington; Arlington Heights; Banksville; Bedford Dwellings; Beechview; Beltzhoover; Bloomfield; Bluff; Bon Air; Brighton Heights; Brookline; California-Kirkbride; Carrick; Central Business District; Central Lawrenceville; Central Northside; Central Oakland; Chateau; Crafton Heights; Crawford-Roberts; Duquesne Heights; East Allegheny; East Carnegie; East Hills; East Liberty; Elliott; Esplen; Fairywood; Fineview; Friendship; Garfield; Glen Hazel; Greenfield; Hays; Hazelwood; Highland Park; Homewood North; Homewood South; Homewood West; Knoxville; Larimer; Lincoln-Lemington-Belmar; Lower Lawrenceville; Manchester; Marshall-Shadeland; Middle Hill; Morningside; Mount Washington; Mt. Oliver; North Oakland; North Shore; Northview Heights; Oakwood; Perry North; Perry South; Point Breeze; Point Breeze North; Polish Hill; Regent Square; Ridgemont; Shadyside; Sheraden; South Oakland; South Shore; South Side Flats; South Side Slopes; Spring Garden; Spring Hill-City View; Squirrel Hill North; Squirrel Hill South; St. Clair; Stanton Heights; Strip District; Summer Hill; Terrace Village; Troy Hill; Upper Hill; Upper Lawrenceville; West End; West Oakland; Westwood'
node_9_answer = 'Lincoln Place; North Shore; Point Breeze; Regent Square; South Shore; Stanton Heights; Strip District; Swisshelm Park; West End'
candidates = set(node_7_answer.split('; ')) & set(node_8_answer.split('; ')) & set(node_9_answer.split('; '))
df['Neighborhood'] = df['Neighborhood'].astype(str).str.strip()
grade_cols = [
    'Estimate; Enrolled in school: - Enrolled in grade 1',
    'Estimate; Enrolled in school: - Enrolled in grade 2',
    'Estimate; Enrolled in school: - Enrolled in grade 3',
    'Estimate; Enrolled in school: - Enrolled in grade 4',
    'Estimate; Enrolled in school: - Enrolled in grade 5',
    'Estimate; Enrolled in school: - Enrolled in grade 6',
    'Estimate; Enrolled in school: - Enrolled in grade 7',
    'Estimate; Enrolled in school: - Enrolled in grade 8',
    'Estimate; Enrolled in school: - Enrolled in grade 9',
    'Estimate; Enrolled in school: - Enrolled in grade 10',
    'Estimate; Enrolled in school: - Enrolled in grade 11',
    'Estimate; Enrolled in school: - Enrolled in grade 12'
]
for col in grade_cols:
    df[col] = pd.to_numeric(df[col].astype(str).str.replace(',', '', regex=False).str.strip(), errors='coerce').fillna(0)
df['k12_enrolled'] = df[grade_cols].sum(axis=1)
ranked = df[df['Neighborhood'].isin(candidates)][['Neighborhood', 'k12_enrolled']].sort_values(['k12_enrolled', 'Neighborhood'], ascending=[False, True]).reset_index(drop=True)
answer = ranked.iloc[1]['Neighborhood']

ideal_query.intent: In this Pittsburgh neighborhood profile, which neighborhood names appear? Return them as a semicolon-separated list sorted alphabetically.
ideal_query.sql:
SELECT string_agg(neighborhood, '; ' ORDER BY neighborhood) AS answer
FROM (
  SELECT DISTINCT TRIM(CAST("neighborhood" AS VARCHAR)) AS neighborhood
  FROM t
  WHERE "neighborhood" IS NOT NULL
) q

ideal_query.intent: Among the neighborhoods listed in node 1, which ten rank highest by share of college graduates in 1984? Return them as a semicolon-separated list in rank order.
ideal_query.sql:
WITH allowed(community) AS (VALUES ('31st Ward'),
    ('Allegheny Center'),
    ('Allegheny West'),
    ('Allentown'),
    ('Arlington'),
    ('Arlington Heights'),
    ('Banksville'),
    ('Bedford Dwellings'),
    ('Beechview'),
    ('Beltzhoover'),
    ('Bloomfield'),
    ('Bon Air'),
    ('Brighton Heights'),
    ('Brookline'),
    ('California Ave.'),
    ('Carrick'),
    ('Central North Side'),
    ('Crafton Heights - Westwood - Oakwood'),
    ('East Carnegie'),
    ('East Hills'),
    ('East Liberty'),
    ('East North Side'),
    ('Elliot'),
    ('Esplen'),
    ('Friendship'),
    ('Garfield'),
    ('Greenfield'),
    ('Harpen Hilltop'),
    ('Hazelwood-Glenwood-Glen Hazel'),
    ('Highland Park'),
    ('Homewood North'),
    ('Homewood South'),
    ('Homewood West'),
    ('Knoxville'),
    ('Larimer'),
    ('Lawrenceville'),
    ('Lincoln-Lemington-Belmar'),
    ('Lower Lawrenceville'),
    ('Lower Oakland'),
    ('Manchester'),
    ('Middle Hill'),
    ('Morningside'),
    ('Mount Washington - Duquesne Heights'),
    ('North Oakland'),
    ('North View Heights'),
    ('Perry North'),
    ('Perry South'),
    ('Point Breeze'),
    ('Polish Hill'),
    ('Regent Square'),
    ('Ridgemont - Chicken Hill'),
    ('Shadeland Halls Grove'),
    ('Shadyside'),
    ('Sheraton Chartiers'),
    ('South Oakland'),
    ('Southside Flats'),
    ('Southside Slopes'),
    ('Spring Hill'),
    ('Squirrel Hill - North of Forbes'),
    ('Squirrel Hill - South of Forbes'),
    ('St. Clair'),
    ('Stanton Heights'),
    ('Swisshelm Park'),
    ('Terrace Village'),
    ('The Bluff'),
    ('The Strip'),
    ('Troy Hill'),
    ('Upper Hill'),
    ('Upper Lawrenceville'),
    ('West End Valley')), ranked AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT TRIM(CAST("Community" AS VARCHAR)) AS community,
    TRY_CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(CAST("%grad_coll" AS VARCHAR), '%', ''), ',', '') AS DOUBLE) AS metric
  FROM t
  WHERE TRIM(CAST("Community" AS VARCHAR)) IN (SELECT community FROM allowed)
    AND TRY_CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(CAST("%grad_coll" AS VARCHAR), '%', ''), ',', '') AS DOUBLE) IS NOT NULL
  ORDER BY metric DESC, community ASC
  LIMIT 10
)
SELECT string_agg(community, '; ' ORDER BY metric DESC, community ASC) AS answer
FROM ranked
ideal_query.answer: Point Breeze; Regent Square; Shadyside; Highland Park; Allegheny Center; Friendship; Banksville; Stanton Heights; East Liberty; Greenfield

ideal_query.intent: Among the neighborhoods common to the answers to node 7, node 8, and node 9, which had the second-highest number of residents enrolled in grades 1 through 12 in 2015? Break any ties alphabetically.
ideal_query.sql:
WITH candidates(neighborhood) AS (VALUES ('North Shore'),
    ('Regent Square'),
    ('South Shore'),
    ('Stanton Heights'),
    ('Strip District'),
    ('West End')), scored AS (
  SELECT TRIM(CAST("Neighborhood" AS VARCHAR)) AS neighborhood,
    COALESCE(TRY_CAST(REPLACE(CAST("Estimate; Enrolled in school: - Enrolled in grade 1" AS VARCHAR), ',', '') AS DOUBLE), 0) +
    COALESCE(TRY_CAST(REPLACE(CAST("Estimate; Enrolled in school: - Enrolled in grade 2" AS VARCHAR), ',', '') AS DOUBLE), 0) +
    COALESCE(TRY_CAST(REPLACE(CAST("Estimate; Enrolled in school: - Enrolled in grade 3" AS VARCHAR), ',', '') AS DOUBLE), 0) +
    COALESCE(TRY_CAST(REPLACE(CAST("Estimate; Enrolled in school: - Enrolled in grade 4" AS VARCHAR), ',', '') AS DOUBLE), 0) +
    COALESCE(TRY_CAST(REPLACE(CAST("Estimate; Enrolled in school: - Enrolled in grade 5" AS VARCHAR), ',', '') AS DOUBLE), 0) +
    COALESCE(TRY_CAST(REPLACE(CAST("Estimate; Enrolled in school: - Enrolled in grade 6" AS VARCHAR), ',', '') AS DOUBLE), 0) +
    COALESCE(TRY_CAST(REPLACE(CAST("Estimate; Enrolled in school: - Enrolled in grade 7" AS VARCHAR), ',', '') AS DOUBLE), 0) +
    COALESCE(TRY_CAST(REPLACE(CAST("Estimate; Enrolled in school: - Enrolled in grade 8" AS VARCHAR), ',', '') AS DOUBLE), 0) +
    COALESCE(TRY_CAST(REPLACE(CAST("Estimate; Enrolled in school: - Enrolled in grade 9" AS VARCHAR), ',', '') AS DOUBLE), 0) +
    COALESCE(TRY_CAST(REPLACE(CAST("Estimate; Enrolled in school: - Enrolled in grade 10" AS VARCHAR), ',', '') AS DOUBLE), 0) +
    COALESCE(TRY_CAST(REPLACE(CAST("Estimate; Enrolled in school: - Enrolled in grade 11" AS VARCHAR), ',', '') AS DOUBLE), 0) +
    COALESCE(TRY_CAST(REPLACE(CAST("Estimate; Enrolled in school: - Enrolled in grade 12" AS VARCHAR), ',', '') AS DOUBLE), 0) AS k12_enrolled
  FROM t
  WHERE TRIM(CAST("Neighborhood" AS VARCHAR)) IN (SELECT neighborhood FROM candidates)
), ranked AS (
  SELECT neighborhood, k12_enrolled
  FROM scored
  ORDER BY k12_enrolled DESC, neighborhood ASC
)
SELECT neighborhood AS answer
FROM ranked
LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1
